creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jochen Neumeister from comment #2)
But what currently installed version are you running? (i.e., uname -a)?

I build -CURRENT about every day and have not seen this. I'd suggest trying a "rm -rf /usr/obj/usr/src/"; also posting to the FreeBSD-current mailing list is more likely to be useful in addressing build errors.
